summary: CRITICAL: Deliverable is incomplete and non-functional. Workflow references `pytest tests/` but no test files exist. Test harness expects `fixtures/` subdirectories (rules.yaml, expected.json, files.txt) that aren't provided—run_act_tests.py will fail immediately on FIXTURES list. Actions not pinned to SHA (best practice violation; should use full 40-char commit hash). label_assigner.py logic is well-designed with proper type hints and error handling (score 4); workflow structure is sound but fragile. Claim that workflow "Actually run successfully when executed locally with `act`" is false—unit-tests job fails (no tests), fixture runs fail (missing fixtures). Missing critical test/fixture infrastructure prevents any `act` execution.
